name: base-4096-contracts
description: Two free collectible NFTs (PremiumNFT + AchievementBadge) for 4096base (Base Sepolia testnet). No payment, fee, fund, or custody contracts.
comment:hardhat-pin: Hardhat is pinned to EXACTLY 2.26.1, a known-good toolchain that bundles the STABLE @nomicfoundation/edr 0.11.3. (The Base-mainnet fork test that originally forced this pin has been removed along with the fund feature; the pin is retained simply because it compiles and runs the NFT tests cleanly — bumping is optional and unrelated to current functionality.)
comment:hardhat-ethers-pin: @nomicfoundation/hardhat-toolbox@5 pulls hardhat-ethers@3.1.3, which bumped its peer requirement to hardhat ^2.28.0 and conflicts with the 2.26.1 pin. The override below holds it at 3.1.2 — the last release that accepts hardhat ^2.26.0.
